verses.1: Blessed are those whose ways are blameless,
verses.2: Blessed are those who keep his statutes,
verses.5: Oh that my ways were steadfast
verses.7: I will give thanks to you with uprightness of heart,
verses.9: How can a young man keep his way pure?
verses.10: With my whole heart I have sought you.
verses.11: I have hidden your word in my heart,
verses.14: I have rejoiced in the way of your testimonies,
verses.15: I will meditate on your precepts,
verses.16: I will delight myself in your statutes.
verses.19: I am a stranger on the earth.
verses.20: My soul is consumed with longing for your ordinances at all times.
verses.21: You have rebuked the proud who are cursed,
verses.22: Take reproach and contempt away from me,
verses.23: Though princes sit and slander me,
verses.24: Indeed your statutes are my delight,
verses.25: My soul is laid low in the dust.
verses.26: I declared my ways, and you answered me.
verses.27: Let me understand the teaching of your precepts!
verses.28: My soul is weary with sorrow;
verses.29: Keep me from the way of deceit.
verses.30: I have chosen the way of truth.
verses.31: I cling to your statutes, LORD.
verses.32: I run in the path of your commandments,
verses.33: Teach me, LORD, the way of your statutes.
verses.34: Give me understanding, and I will keep your law.
verses.35: Direct me in the path of your commandments,
verses.36: Turn my heart toward your statutes,
verses.37: Turn my eyes away from looking at worthless things.
verses.38: Fulfill your promise to your servant,
verses.39: Take away my disgrace that I dread,
verses.40: Behold, I long for your precepts!
verses.41: Let your loving kindness also come to me, LORD,
verses.42: So I will have an answer for him who reproaches me,
verses.43: Don’t snatch the word of truth out of my mouth,
verses.44: So I will obey your law continually,
verses.46: I will also speak of your statutes before kings,
verses.47: I will delight myself in your commandments,
verses.48: I reach out my hands for your commandments, which I love.
verses.49: Remember your word to your servant,
verses.50: This is my comfort in my affliction,
verses.52: I remember your ordinances of old, LORD,
verses.53: Indignation has taken hold on me,
verses.54: Your statutes have been my songs
verses.55: I have remembered your name, LORD, in the night,
verses.58: I sought your favor with my whole heart.
verses.60: I will hurry, and not delay,
verses.61: The ropes of the wicked bind me,
verses.62: At midnight I will rise to give thanks to you,
verses.63: I am a friend of all those who fear you,
verses.64: The earth is full of your loving kindness, LORD.
verses.65: You have treated your servant well,
verses.66: Teach me good judgment and knowledge,
verses.67: Before I was afflicted, I went astray;
verses.68: You are good, and do good.
verses.69: The proud have smeared a lie upon me.
verses.70: Their heart is as callous as the fat,
verses.71: It is good for me that I have been afflicted,
verses.72: The law of your mouth is better to me than thousands of pieces of gold and silver.
verses.73: Your hands have made me and formed me.
verses.74: Those who fear you will see me and be glad,
verses.75: LORD, I know that your judgments are righteous,
verses.76: Please let your loving kindness be for my comfort,
verses.77: Let your tender mercies come to me, that I may live;
verses.78: Let the proud be disappointed, for they have overthrown me wrongfully.
verses.79: Let those who fear you turn to me.
verses.80: Let my heart be blameless toward your decrees,
verses.81: My soul faints for your salvation.
verses.82: My eyes fail for your word.
verses.83: For I have become like a wineskin in the smoke.
verses.84: How many are the days of your servant?
verses.85: The proud have dug pits for me,
verses.86: All of your commandments are faithful.
verses.87: They had almost wiped me from the earth,
verses.88: Preserve my life according to your loving kindness,
verses.89: LORD, your word is settled in heaven forever.
verses.90: Your faithfulness is to all generations.
verses.91: Your laws remain to this day,
verses.92: Unless your law had been my delight,
verses.93: I will never forget your precepts,
verses.95: The wicked have waited for me, to destroy me.
verses.96: I have seen a limit to all perfection,
verses.98: Your commandments make me wiser than my enemies,
verses.99: I have more understanding than all my teachers,
verses.100: I understand more than the aged,
verses.101: I have kept my feet from every evil way,
verses.102: I have not turned away from your ordinances,
verses.103: How sweet are your promises to my taste,
verses.104: Through your precepts, I get understanding;
verses.105: Your word is a lamp to my feet,
verses.106: I have sworn, and have confirmed it,
verses.108: Accept, I beg you, the willing offerings of my mouth.
verses.109: My soul is continually in my hand,
verses.110: The wicked have laid a snare for me,
verses.111: I have taken your testimonies as a heritage forever,
verses.112: I have set my heart to perform your statutes forever,
verses.114: You are my hiding place and my shield.
verses.116: Uphold me according to your word, that I may live.
verses.117: Hold me up, and I will be safe,
verses.118: You reject all those who stray from your statutes,
verses.119: You put away all the wicked of the earth like dross.
verses.120: My flesh trembles for fear of you.
verses.121: I have done what is just and righteous.
verses.123: My eyes fail looking for your salvation,
verses.124: Deal with your servant according to your loving kindness.
verses.125: I am your servant. Give me understanding,
verses.126: It is time to act, LORD,
verses.127: Therefore I love your commandments more than gold,
verses.128: Therefore I consider all of your precepts to be right.
verses.130: The entrance of your words gives light.
verses.131: I opened my mouth wide and panted,
verses.132: Turn to me, and have mercy on me,
verses.133: Establish my footsteps in your word.
verses.134: Redeem me from the oppression of man,
verses.135: Make your face shine on your servant.
verses.136: Streams of tears run down my eyes,
verses.138: You have commanded your statutes in righteousness.
verses.140: Your promises have been thoroughly tested,
verses.142: Your righteousness is an everlasting righteousness.
verses.143: Trouble and anguish have taken hold of me.
verses.145: I have called with my whole heart.
verses.146: I have called to you. Save me!
verses.147: I rise before dawn and cry for help.
verses.148: My eyes stay open through the night watches,
verses.149: Hear my voice according to your loving kindness.
verses.150: They draw near who follow after wickedness.
verses.152: Of old I have known from your testimonies,
verses.153: Consider my affliction, and deliver me,
verses.154: Plead my cause, and redeem me!
verses.155: Salvation is far from the wicked,
verses.156: Great are your tender mercies, LORD.
verses.157: Many are my persecutors and my adversaries.
verses.158: I look at the faithless with loathing,
verses.159: Consider how I love your precepts.
verses.160: All of your words are truth.
verses.161: Princes have persecuted me without a cause,
verses.164: Seven times a day, I praise you,
verses.165: Those who love your law have great peace.
verses.166: I have hoped for your salvation, LORD.
verses.167: My soul has observed your testimonies.
verses.168: I have obeyed your precepts and your testimonies,
verses.169: Let my cry come before you, LORD.
verses.170: Let my supplication come before you.
verses.172: Let my tongue sing of your word,
verses.173: Let your hand be ready to help me,
verses.174: I have longed for your salvation, LORD.
verses.175: Let my soul live, that I may praise you.
verses.176: I have gone astray like a lost sheep.
